roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/X:THE DA'S MOTION TO AMEND THE PETITION TO ALLEGE VIOLATION #7 - ABSCONDING, IS GRANTED,/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:THE PAROLEE'S ADMISSION IS AS TO VIOLATION #7 ONLY,/3000REIN/PAJ:110 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  11  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:THE COURT DISMISSES VIOLATIONS #1- #6 FOR LACK OF EVIDENCE,/X:PAROLE WAS SUSPENDED ON 12-06-13,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO:04-21-14 /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
